scenes.title: Hook
scenes.text: This is Runwiser. It turns repeated agent work into reusable workflow assets, with proof attached.

scenes.title: Proof First
scenes.text: The landing page leads with the operating model. Runs create evidence, gates check quality, and only verified work moves forward.

scenes.title: PI Agent Orchestration
scenes.text: This is not loose multi-agent parallelism. Five specialized roles move work through research, compose, review, verify, and writeback.

scenes.title: Live Wiki Service
scenes.text: The live wiki service makes the knowledge layer concrete. You can open the catalog, move into a detail page, and browse promoted workflow knowledge directly.

scenes.title: Architecture Overview
scenes.text: The system is organized into five layers around one promotion loop. Evidence starts at layer zero, reusable skills live at layer one, and optimization stays in layer two.

scenes.title: Architecture Boundary
scenes.text: Layer three becomes durable knowledge, while layer four keeps scenario validation local. That boundary matters, because scenarios can validate the architecture, but they should not define it.

scenes.title: Proof In The Repo
scenes.text: You can see that separation directly in the repo. Runs, workflows, scripts, knowledge assets, and scenario wrappers live in different places for different jobs.

scenes.title: Close
scenes.text: That is the point of Runwiser. Make agent work measurable, improvable, and reusable by preserving evidence before promotion.
